en.text: from G0001 (as a particle of union) and κέλευθος (a road); properly, to be in the same way with, i.e. to accompany (specially, as a disciple)

senses.gloss_en: from G0001 (as a particle of union) and κέλευθος (a road); properly, to be in the same way with, i.e. to accompany (specially, as a disciple)
